title: RSVD Pony paintings
description: The mod adds 31 MLP-themed paintings by RSVD with his permission. The mod is based on Mcreator and is more of a themed addon for the Mine little pony mod, although it can be used without it.
body: The mod adds 31 MLP-themed paintings by RSVD (with his permission) and is based on Mcreator. The mod was created as a thematic addition to Mine little pony, but it can also be used independently.All rights to the images belong to the author, not to me. Please do not use them without his permission.
